title: Junior Business Development Manager at NoBroker

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? NoBroker in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
